pageContext.name: Jack Skellington
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom Toy are excited to present the Prop Size Jack Skellington Vinyl Collectible!  The faithful reproduction of Jack Skellington stands at approximately 17.71' and comes with 12 replaceable facial parts so various facial expressions can be reproduced.  He also comes in a luxurious coffin box. Disney collectibles fans, don't miss your chance to add this Jack Skellington Figure to your Nightmare Before Christmas collection today!
